pr.title: Record: 11L Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + Late QAT + XSA4 (val_bpb: 1.1248)

output.summary: 11-layer Muon/EMA stack adds 16-dim partial RoPE, RMSNorm scaling, and late-triggered int6 QAT atop the XSA/SmearGate architecture.
techniques: Partial RoPE on 16 of 64 head dims mixes positional and position-free attention
Scale RMSNorm output by 1/√(layer_idx+1) to stabilize deep layers
Enable STE int6 QAT only when lr_scale drops below 0.1
